## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (or justification if not needed)
- [ ] `pnpm -s lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -s test -- --run` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -s build` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/UPGRADE_LOG.md`, etc.)

## Risk and rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:
